Interface PreferenceEOMapper

All Known Implementing Classes:
PreferenceEOMapperImpl
interface PreferenceEOMapper
A PreferenceEOMapper maps between PreferenceEO (JPA entity) and Preference (domain model).
Author:
Heiko Scherrer
